symptoms.symptom_name: New sustained rapid irregular palpitations with exertional dyspnoea

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Sudden sustained irregular palpitations with breathlessness are the typical patient-reportable presentation of AF with rapid ventricular response.
Atrial arrhythmia and heart failure are recognised cardiac complications of myocardial iron deposition.
Fatigue is a common early systemic symptom of iron overload; also reflects the evolving heart failure.
Capsular stretch from an enlarging infiltrated liver produces a dull constant RUQ ache.
Biliary colic is characteristically colicky/intermittent, not dull and constant.

symptoms.symptom_name: Chronic 2nd/3rd metacarpophalangeal joint pain and stiffness

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Arthropathy of the 2nd and 3rd MCP joints is a characteristic (relatively specific) feature of haemochromatosis.
Isolated 2nd/3rd MCP involvement is atypical for primary osteoarthritis.

symptoms.symptom_name: Gradual bronze / slate-grey skin hyperpigmentation in sun-exposed areas

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Bronze/slate-grey pigmentation from dermal iron and melanin is a classic sign of chronic iron overload ('bronze diabetes').
New secondary diabetes from pancreatic iron deposition is part of the classic 'bronze diabetes' triad.
Pituitary/gonadal iron deposition causes hypogonadotrophic hypogonadism, contributing to reduced libido.
Alcohol is an additive hepatotoxin that accelerates iron-related liver damage.

symptoms.symptom_name: Irregularly irregular pulse with a pulse deficit

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: An irregularly irregular pulse with a pulse deficit is the bedside hallmark of AF — a clinician finding, not obtainable via telehealth.

symptoms.symptom_name: Firm hepatomegaly ~4 cm below the costal margin and elevated JVP

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: hepatic infiltration with early heart failure
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Palpable firm hepatomegaly and raised JVP indicate advanced organ involvement — clinician-only findings, sealed.

symptoms.symptom_name: 12-lead ECG showing atrial fibrillation with rapid ventricular response

investigation_details.expected_result: Atrial fibrillation with rapid ventricular response
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: The arrhythmia is not characterised and rate/rhythm and stroke-prevention decisions cannot be made.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: ECG is definitive for the rhythm — never available in real time via telehealth.

symptoms.symptom_name: Elevated transferrin saturation and serum ferritin (iron studies)

loinc_ref.display: Iron saturation [Mass Fraction] in Serum or Plasma

investigation_details.investigation_name: Iron studies (transferrin saturation, ferritin) and LFTs
investigation_details.expected_result: Raised transferrin saturation and ferritin; deranged LFTs
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: The underlying iron-overload disorder cannot be confirmed.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Elevated transferrin saturation and ferritin are the biochemical basis of diagnosis — a hospital/lab investigation, never available via telehealth.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Bronze skin + secondary diabetes + characteristic MCP arthropathy + hepatomegaly + hypogonadism together form the classic iron-overload phenotype; recognising the cluster is the diagnostic key.

symptom_clusters.target_diagnosis: new-onset atrial fibrillation with early heart failure
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: The time-critical complication driving today's presentation and the urgent escalation.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Characterise the new arrhythmia and guide rate/rhythm and anticoagulation decisions.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Iron studies (transferrin saturation, ferritin), LFTs, HFE genotype
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Confirm the underlying iron-overload disorder and degree of hepatic involvement.
Assess for iron cardiomyopathy and heart-failure severity.
Assess hepatomegaly and screen for cirrhosis/complications.
